fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the document type that the entry belongs to in the purchase order archive.

Quote


Order


Invoice


Credit Memo


Blanket Order


Return Order

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor who returns the products.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the archived purchase order.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor sending the order.

fields.name: Pay-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor who you receive the invoice or credit memo from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's buy-from address.

fields.name: Pay-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the vendor's buy-from address.

fields.name: Pay-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company at the address to which the items were shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name for the order address of the vendor.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's buy-from address.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the vendor's buy-from address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of a contact person at the address that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the order was created. The order date is also used to determine the prices and discounts on the document.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the document was posted.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date you expect the items to be available in your warehouse. If you leave the field blank, it will be calculated as follows: Planned Receipt Date + Safety Lead Time + Inbound Warehouse Handling Time = Expected Receipt Date.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount on the purchase document.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment discount percentage that is granted if you pay on or before the date entered in the Pmt. Discount Date field. The discount percentage is specified in the Payment Terms Code field.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the amount in the entry must be paid for a payment discount to be granted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Vendor Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains information about sales quotes, purchase quotes, or orders in earlier versions of the document.
The information is stored when you archive a sales quote, purchase quote, or order. The information is copied from the Sales Header or Purchase Header table.
For more information, see Help for the related field.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on the line.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Unit Price and Line Amount fields on document lines should be shown with or without VAT.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for the archived purchase header.
To see a comment, or to create a new one, click the Comment field. The Purchase Archive Comment Sheet window appears. You can see the existing comments and create new ones.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip: Specifies when an entry for an unpaid invoice has been posted and you create a finance charge memo or reminder.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Vendor Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's order number.

fields.name: Vendor Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's shipment number. It is inserted in the corresponding field on the source document during posting.

fields.name: Vendor Invoice No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the original document you received from the vendor. You can require the document number for posting, or let it be optional. By default, it's required, so that this document references the original. Making document numbers optional removes a step from the posting process. For example, if you attach the original invoice as a PDF, you might not need to enter the document number. To specify whether document numbers are required, in the Purchases & Payables Setup window, select or clear the Ext. Doc. No. Mandatory field.

fields.name: Vendor Cr. Memo No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for the credit memo you are creating in this purchase return order.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Interaction Exist
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the archived document is linked to an interaction log entry.

fields.name: Time Archived
fields.tooltip: Specifies what time the document was archived.

fields.name: Date Archived
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the document was archived.

fields.name: Archived By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who archived the document.

fields.name: Version No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the archived document.

fields.name: Doc. No. Occurrence
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of times the "No." value has been used in the number series.
This number, in combination with the document number, ensures that you always maintain a unique number for the archived document. This is convenient if, for example, you have changed the number series and, as a result, a conflict of numbers arises.

fields.name: Requested Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you want the vendor to deliver your order. The field is used to calculate the latest date you can order, as follows: requested receipt date - lead time calculation = order date. If you do not need delivery on a specific date, you can leave the field blank.

fields.name: Promised Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the vendor has promised to deliver the order.

fields.name: Lead Time Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the amount of time it takes to replenish the item.

fields.name: Inbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time it takes to make items part of available inventory, after the items have been posted as received.
